caption:
The lecture hall lights dimmed, but the air between us didn't cool down. 🌡️ I adjusted the hem of my tailored pencil skirt, feeling the familiar, delicious tightness across my hips and the subtle weight of my chest, perfectly concealed yet undeniable beneath my crisp silk blouse. Professor Laurent had stayed late, his gaze lingering longer than necessary as he traced the lines of a complex equation on the whiteboard, his sleeves rolled up to reveal strong forearms. 📝✨ The rest of the students had filed out, leaving us in a bubble of silence and electricity. He turned slowly, his eyes darkening as they dropped to the curve of my waist before meeting my gaze again. 'Your analysis was... thorough,' he murmured, stepping closer, his presence enveloping me. I smiled, tilting my head, letting the moment stretch. The way his shirt hugged his shoulders, the scent of old books and cologne, the way he reached out to brush a stray hair from my forehead—it was all so intensely sexy without a single glance being too overt. 💋🎓 As the campus clock chimed the hour, I realized I wasn't just teaching history tonight; I was living it. One step, two steps, until the distance between us vanished. 😏🔥
